node.title: Uber Interview (Depth in Specialization round SE-1)

topic.title: Uber Interview (Depth in Specialization round SE-1)

post.content:
Hi everyone,

I have an upcoming interview for the Software Engineer I (L3) role at Uber, and I’m wondering what to expect during the "Depth in Specialization" round. I’ve been informed that there will be two technical rounds on the same day.

Could anyone who has gone through this process or is familiar with it share insights on what topics or questions are typically covered in the Depth in Specialization round for this role?

Any advice would be greatly appreciated!
Is this for the 2024 batch? If it is then I can guide you.
How many rounds are in total?
